description: You are a quantitative developer at an HFT firm. A Java 17 limit order book matching engine at /home/ga/workspace/matching_engine/ is failing under load, causing ConcurrentModificationExceptions, deadlocks, CPU spinning, and race conditions. Fix five specific concurrency bugs in src/matching/: CPU spinning in OrderProcessor.java, thread visibility for the shutdown flag in MatchingEngine.java, race condition when caching the best bid in OrderBook.java, cyclic deadlock in BalanceTransfer.java, and thread-safety in the subscriber list in MarketPublisher.java. Fix the thread-safety issues without changing the overall architecture or method signatures. Verify the fixes by running bash run_load_test.sh in the terminal and ensuring it prints 'status: SUCCESS' within a few seconds
